title: NR25 7BP, Hook 2 Sisters Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/AP3632YP/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Hook 2 Sisters Limited   Installation name: Langham Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/AP3632YP/V005   "
